data.name: CopyKeyDescription
data.value: For security reasons, this API key is shown only once. Store it in a password manager or secret store before leaving this page.

data.name: NamePlaceholder
data.value: CI workflow, internal tool, local scripts...

data.name: NameHint
data.value: Use a name that makes the key easy to recognize later.

data.name: ExpiresHint
data.value: Leave empty for a key that does not expire automatically.

data.name: ExpirationFuture
data.value: Expiration date must be in the future.

data.name: CreateSuccess
data.value: API key created. Copy it now: it will not be shown again.

data.name: CreateFailed
data.value: API key could not be created.
